title: Songs of Dreams and Destiny
summary: An afternoon concert at Peninsula Community Theatre, Mornington — choral and orchestral programming, 2:30pm to 4:15pm.
kidsGradeNote: Suitable for older kids interested in music. Primarily an adult audience.
editorVerdict: A late-May cultural listing for arts-minded couples or locals. Broadens the What's On page beyond markets and hot springs.
editorNote: Peninsula Community Theatre does consistent, unhyped work — and an afternoon concert at the end of May suits the shorter days and the quieter mood that early winter brings to the Peninsula. Songs of Dreams and Destiny runs 2:30pm to 4:15pm, which is the right length for a Sunday afternoon that doesn't want to become a full-day commitment. Worth the booking for arts-minded locals or visitors who want the Peninsula to feel like more than food and bathing.
